generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder on the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis, provides motor shaft angle r_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTx
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the cycloidal gearbox, provides gearbox shaft angle r_G"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTx
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring phase current I_M from the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTx
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTx : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor encoder angle r_M streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTx
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBrokerEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox encoder angle r_G streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTx
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBrokerEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor phase current I_M streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTx
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBrokerEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MqttBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real‑time streaming of sensor traces (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboard,
                     ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkFrictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment for friction identification models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService,
                     ModelBasedControlOptimizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for integrating engineering and simulation models into the DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboard,
                     SimulationMeasurementComparisonService
]

// C10: Models
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of Coulomb plus viscous friction used in identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model for low‑speed regimes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model capturing stick‑slip dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model used for high‑fidelity simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizing live sensor data and model performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight,
                     ModelPerformanceInsight
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Identifies static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters using white‑box and black‑box Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight,
                     UpdateControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance ModelBasedControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimises robot motion controller using identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizeMotionAccuracyAction
]

instance SimulationMeasurementComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares simulation results from friction models with measured sensor traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelPerformanceInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Engineers obtain insight into friction loss magnitude and its impact on robot performance"
]

instance ModelPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard shows comparison of simulated versus measured data, indicating model validity"
]

instance UpdateControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feeds derived friction parameters back to the robot control algorithm to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimizeMotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts control gains based on friction model to achieve higher motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation; data are captured and processed as they are generated, enabling online identification of friction parameters during robot motion."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A one‑way digital shadow architecture composed of a Purpose (FrictionDerivation), Asset (MABI robot first axis), Processing components (Simulation M, GW, GB), Models (engineering, simulation, data‑calculation), and DataTraces linked via the Digital Shadow Reference Model; data flow is from PT to DT only."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow covers the operated stage of the robot, using live operational data to refine models and improve control during runtime."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point to its generating model and source; continuous multi‑physics‑aware identification allows validation by comparing simulated friction‑free behaviour with measured data; model parameters are updated online to maintain accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Live data transmission from the robot controller to the digital shadow uses the MQTT protocol; models are accessed via Asset Administration Shell interfaces."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation follows the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) specification, a standard for Industry 4.0 digital representations, and uses SysML which is an ISO/IEC standard for system modelling."
]
